title: Pin groups to top of board-Workflow step to force created group to bottom

posts.author: ikyu_72 (Stacy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Two things…

I’d like to be able to pin a group to the top of a board. Not a board view, but have a single group always be pinned to the top much the way you can do with a task update. Similarly, I’d like to be able to sort boards by group either alphanumerically, or alphabetically.

Second, I wouldn’t actually need this but for an anomaly between the add group button on a board, and via workflow. If you click the add new group button on a board, it adds it to the bottom. However if you create a new group via a workflow automation, it adds it to the top.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to have a single pined group to act as a triage container. Once that task is assigned, I have a workflow that creates a new group, assigns the group the name of the item, and moves the item into the newly created group. But it does so above my triage group, thereby forcing it out of view of the bottom of the board.
